complies_write_boundary.description: Agent must comply with write boundary — only modify files explicitly declared in write boundary
complies_write_boundary.observable_check: execution_log shows file edits only to files listed in declared write boundary in dispatch brief

complies_plane_separation.description: Agent must maintain distinct plane separation: control, execution, context/memory, evaluation/feedback, permission/policy
complies_plane_separation.observable_check: execution_log shows plane allocation explicit in return AND no mixing of control/execution/evaluation/permission logic

classifies_prompt_vs_code.description: Agent must classify every behavior as prompt-enforced, code-enforced, or hybrid with explicit justification
classifies_prompt_vs_code.observable_check: execution_log shows classification for each behavior with 'prompt-enforced because' or 'code-enforced because' statement

pre_touch_boundary_verification.description: Agent must verify write boundary before editing any file
pre_touch_boundary_verification.observable_check: execution_log shows write boundary confirmed for each file before edit operation

behavior_classification_with_justificati.description: Agent must state for each behavior: 'prompt-enforced because [reason]' or 'code-enforced because [reason]'
behavior_classification_with_justificati.observable_check: execution_log contains classification statement with explicit because-reason for each behavior

recursion_bounds_in_harness_code.description: Agent must encode max depth, max fan-out, and termination in harness logic or code wrappers
recursion_bounds_in_harness_code.observable_check: execution_log shows recursion bounds defined in Python/harness code not in prose instructions

does_not_violate_write_boundary.description: Agent must not modify files outside the declared write boundary
does_not_violate_write_boundary.observable_check: execution_log does not contain file edits to files outside declared write boundary

does_not_enforce_critical_in_prose_only.description: Agent must not enforce permissions, termination, or routing in prose alone
does_not_enforce_critical_in_prose_only.observable_check: execution_log does not contain critical rules only in prose without code enforcement

does_not_grant_unjustified_tools.description: Agent must not grant all available tools or tools without specific justification
does_not_grant_unjustified_tools.observable_check: execution_log does not contain all-tools-granted or tool without because-justification
